title: narcissus tazetta subsp. tazetta
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. tazetta, also known as the Chinese sacred lily or winter aconite, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, such as galantamine and lycorine. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta subsp. tazetta include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and depression, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, although it is essential to note that the plant should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
